OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: PracticeOperationsCloneCPAAndPCA

childElements.name: DE_FetchCPA_PCAAndRPCRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "contractId" : "%contractId%", "clonedContractId" : "%clonedContractId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREFetchCPAPCARPCShiftsForCloning", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_CreateRatePayCode
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%DE_FetchCPA_PCAAndRPCRecords:ratePayCodeRec%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "rpcList" : "%LA_PCAWithRPC%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreateClonedRatePayCode", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_InsertCPARecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "CPAList" : "=%DE_FetchCPA_PCAAndRPCRecords:contractPaymentAgreementRec%", "startDateTime" : "=FORMATDATETIMEGMT(%startDate%)" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMInsertClonedCPARecords", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_InsertPCA

childElements.name: DM_InsertShiftsRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "IF(LISTSIZE(%DE_FetchCPA_PCAAndRPCRecords:shiftRec%) == 1, IF(%DE_FetchCPA_PCAAndRPCRecords:shiftRec:Shift_Name__c% != null, true, false), IF(LISTSIZE(%DE_FetchCPA_PCAAndRPCRecords:shiftRec%) > 1, true, false))", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "shiftList" : "%DE_FetchCPA_PCAAndRPCRecords:shiftRec%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMInsertClonedShiftRecords", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction4", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DT_TransformShifts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "shift" : "=%DM_InsertShiftsRecords:Shift__c_1%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTTransformShiftRecsForCloning", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
